sigWerErrors.reason: The insertion of 'trăm' (hundred) changes the number from 'chín một một' (911) to 'chín trăm mười một' (911), which is a different way of saying the same number, so the meaning is preserved.
The substitution of 'một' (one) to 'mười' (ten) in the context of a phone number changes the digit, resulting in an incorrect phone number.
The insertion of 'trăm' (hundred) changes the number from 'hai ba bốn' (234) to 'hai trăm ba mươi bốn' (234), which is a different way of saying the same number, so the meaning is preserved.

The insertion of 'mươi' (ten) as part of 'ba mươi bốn' (thirty-four) is a different way of saying 'ba bốn' (three four), but in the context of a phone number, this changes the digit sequence, making the number incorrect.
The insertion of 'trăm' (hundred) changes 'sáu bảy tám' (678) to 'sáu trăm bảy mươi tám' (678), which is a different way of saying the same number, so the meaning is preserved.
